message:
🧹 Deduplicate StatTile component across 8 status cards (#10214)

Extract identical StatTile component from 8 status cards into a shared
components/cards/shared/StatTile.tsx. All 8 had the same props
({ icon, label, value, colorClass, borderClass }) and identical JSX.

Keycloak was the only variant — it used value.toLocaleString(). Updated
its call sites to format the value before passing (shared component
accepts number | string).

Cards updated: CubeFS, OpenYurt, Fluid, Harbor, KEDA, Keycloak,
Karmada, Knative.

Fixes #10209

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
